project description 1: A full-stack library management system, sing up new members after confirmation, adding, borrowing, deleting books and ...
project description 2: Developed a mobile application that integrates with external movie APIs to fetch and display comprehensive movie information. The app provides users with detailed insights including summaries, ratings, cast information, and other relevant metadata through a clean and user-friendly interface.
project description 3: An AI-powered conversation analysis platform that processes recorded voice sessions, transcribes and analyzes interactions using custom system prompts, and generates structured outputs including summaries, insights, and contextual session reports.
project description 4: A Telegram bot application for managing and showcasing products through an interactive chat interface. The project uses TinyDB for lightweight data storage and supports role-based access with admin and regular users. Admins can manage product information, including descriptions, images, and videos, while normal users can browse and select products directly from the bot’s product list. The system provides a simple and user-friendly way to display multimedia product catalogs inside Telegram.
project description 5: A modern interactive 3D portfolio website built with React and Vite, featuring smooth animations, responsive design, and immersive visual elements to showcase projects, skills, and personal information in an engaging user experience.
project description 6: A modern React Native dental laboratory management application built with Expo and TypeScript, featuring accounting management, doctor and clinic record handling, multilingual support, local database integration with Drizzle ORM, and a scalable mobile-first architecture designed for efficient dental lab workflows.
project description 7: An embedded systems and IoT-based pulse oximeter project developed with Arduino and MAX30102 sensor technology to measure real-time heart rate (BPM) and blood oxygen saturation (SpO₂). The system features sensor integration through I2C communication, real-time biomedical data processing, and serial/OLED visualization for healthcare and biomedical engineering applications.
project description 8: A modern React Native budgeting and personal finance management application built with Expo, featuring expense tracking, budget management, transaction monitoring, and a clean mobile-first user interface designed to help users manage daily financial activities efficiently.
